scripts.port:clear: sh -c 'PORT=${PORT:-3000}; PIDS=$(lsof -ti tcp:$PORT); if [ -n "$PIDS" ]; then kill -9 $PIDS; fi'
scripts.port:clear:debug: sh -c 'DEBUG_PORT=${DEBUG_PORT:-9229}; PIDS=$(lsof -ti tcp:$DEBUG_PORT); if [ -n "$PIDS" ]; then kill -9 $PIDS; fi'
scripts.dev:debug:restart: npm run port:clear && npm run port:clear:debug && npm run dev:debug
scripts.github:setup: git remote add origin https://github.com/thurnix01/victoria-roofing-demo.git || git remote set-url origin https://github.com/thurnix01/victoria-roofing-demo.git
scripts.git:commit: git add . && git commit -m "${npm_config_msg:-chore: update project}"
scripts.deploy:github: npm run github:setup && npm run build && git add . && git commit -m "${npm_config_msg:-deploy: production update}" && git push origin main
